title: garrya ovata var. goldmanii
intro: Garrya ovata var. goldmanii, also known as the 'Goldman's Silk Floss', is a variety of the evergreen shrub Garrya ovata. This plant is native to the southwestern United States and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The leaves and stems of the Garrya ovata var. goldmanii plant have been used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can help to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support overall immune function.
